senses.gloss: instance noun of حَجَلَ (ḥajala, “to hop, to walk as if with one leg shackled”)
a curtained canopy or alcove in a household whereunder a woman remains hidden

etymology.text:
By comparison to حِجْل (ḥijl, “anklet”) as another adornment or restrainment for the female sex.

Singulative noun of حَجَل (ḥajal).
